title: Camp White Oak
summary: An Episode 1 mission in which Division Agents pursue President Ellis at a Black Tusk position outside Washington.

claims.text: Ubisoft introduced Camp White Oak as one of two Episode 1 missions, accessible after World Tier 5 and completion of Tidal Basin.
Division Agents attempt to capture President Ellis at Camp White Oak, but Black Tusk extracts him before they can reach him.

paragraphs.text: Camp White Oak follows Tidal Basin and turns the hunt toward President Ellis. The operation fails to secure him when Black Tusk completes an extraction first.

verification.notes: Later reuse of Camp White Oak in seasonal missions is outside this Episode 1 record.
